prompts:
Each of the 11 static sites now has:
* /starlink-installation/
* /tv-wall-mounting/

the local starlink yes (not tvantennaasperth_)

the local tv wallmounting adword group only in local campaigns

Yeah. Update all all the ads. And Did we actually do the add quality? Add relevant. So yeah, have we had added the keywords to the headlines as well? So yeah, you probably have to update the sitelinks So yeah, do that please.
───

Okay. Add copy. How the fuck do you know, bro? Why are you telling me this? Add strength on some Starlink locals is headline similarity, not missing keywords. How the fuck do you know that? The answer is you don't know that because that's fucking wrong.
───

No. I know exactly what gives you the quality score, bro. Because on the web version, you go into the ad and it gives you a a ranking of poor, average, good, and excellent. And it literally tells you in the top of the fucking ad it says increase your score It rank ranks you on, you know, description similarity or description you know, interest. It mat and it maps you on keywords, and every time it says keywords should appear in the headline. And it tells you the fucking keywords in the ad group to put in the fucking headline. And if you'd spend ten minutes and add the keywords in the head in various ways, your ad copy goes from poor to good to fucking excellent. So I know exactly why, like I told you. Basically the best keywords in that ad group need to be woven in to the fucking headlines. That's how you get excellent. So don't bullshit me, bro. lol
